attributes.description: Alerts when any points are dropped at the shard or cache level (`storage_shard_write_dropped_sum` / `storage_cache_writes_dropped` increase). Direct data loss.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] Dropped writes

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB dropped writes

### What fired
Dropped-write counters increased during the window.

### Why it matters
Dropped points are silent data loss. Usually caused by shard saturation, malformed points, or cardinality limits.

### Triage
1. Check ingest pipeline for retries and errors.
2. Inspect cardinality growth.
3. Look at shard health.

### Remediation
- Fix ingest source.
- Scale InfluxDB or shard differently.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-influxdb.otel-*
// Shard dropped points (cumulative) and cache dropped writes (cumulative)
| WHERE COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_dropped_sum, storage_shard_write_dropped_sum) IS NOT NULL
    OR COALESCE(metrics.storage_cache_writes_dropped, storage_cache_writes_dropped) IS NOT NULL
// Detect increase in dropped points over the window
| STATS min_shard_drop = MIN(COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_dropped_sum, storage_shard_write_dropped_sum)),
    max_shard_drop = MAX(COALESCE(metrics.storage_shard_write_dropped_sum, storage_shard_write_dropped_sum)),
    min_cache_drop = MIN(COALESCE(metrics.storage_cache_writes_dropped, storage_cache_writes_dropped)),
    max_cache_drop = MAX(COALESCE(metrics.storage_cache_writes_dropped, storage_cache_writes_dropped))
  BY host.name
| EVAL shard_drop_increase = max_shard_drop - min_shard_drop,
    cache_drop_increase = max_cache_drop - min_cache_drop
// Alert when any new dropped writes occurred (data loss risk)
| WHERE shard_drop_increase > 0 OR cache_drop_increase > 0
